name: Fathom
description: Automated meeting recording, transcription, and highlights for calls; provides an HTTP API to create and manage recordings and webhooks.

auth_methods.note: Docs state 'Authentication is done via API token' and examples use 'Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_API_TOKEN>'.

credential_access.note: Help doc states 'You can find your API token in your Fathom dashboard under Settings → Integrations', implying developers can obtain tokens from their dashboard without manual approval. No docs were found stating API access requires paid plan or sales contact.

api_surface.note: The API reference lists REST endpoints (POST /recordings, GET /recordings, GET/DELETE /recordings/{id}) and webhook support. SDKs are mentioned but the primary surface is REST; endpoints appear focused on recordings and webhooks (limited/narrow coverage).

buildability.note: Public docs plus self-serve API token available in dashboard -> developer can obtain credentials and call REST endpoints immediately. Rate limit increases require contacting support but do not block initial development.
